## What does this PR add?

<!-- e.g. "A senior backend interview at Stripe (2026)" -->

## If you are adding an interview

- [ ] `content/interviews/<company-slug>-<n>.md` — `id` matches the filename
- [ ] `company:` matches an existing slug in `content/companies/`
- [ ] `source: community`
- [ ] Ran `npm run readme-index` so the README index picks it up
- [ ] These are questions I was **genuinely asked**, and nothing is under NDA
- [ ] No interviewer names or personal details

## Checks

- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes

## Notes

<!-- Anything reviewers should know -->
